# Costa Blanca Movement Centre

> Expert spine and mobility care for the expat community on Spain's Costa Blanca.

Costa Blanca Movement Centre is a mobility and spine health clinic located in Altea, Costa Blanca, Spain. We specialize in non-surgical treatments for back pain, neck pain, sports injuries, and postural problems. Our clinic primarily serves the international expat community — Dutch, British, Scandinavian, and German residents living on the Costa Blanca.

## Treatments

- [Spinal Decompression](/treatments/spinal-decompression): Non-surgical treatment to relieve compressed spinal discs and nerves.
- [Sports Massage](/treatments/sports-massage): Deep tissue and sports-focused massage for recovery and injury prevention.
- [Postural Assessment](/treatments/postural-assessment): Comprehensive evaluation of alignment and movement patterns.
- [Dry Needling](/treatments/dry-needling): Targeted trigger point therapy using thin needles for pain relief.

## Conditions We Treat

- [Lower Back Pain](/conditions/lower-back-pain)
- [Neck Pain](/conditions/neck-pain)
- [Sciatica](/conditions/sciatica)
- [Herniated Disc](/conditions/herniated-disc)

## Location

- Address: Calle Example 123, Altea 03590, Alicante, Spain
- Phone: +34 XXX XXX XXX
- Hours: Mon–Fri 9:00–18:00, Sat 9:00–13:00

## Service Areas

Altea (primary clinic), Benidorm, Jávea, Dénia

## Languages

English, Dutch, Spanish
